# Embroidery & Threads

> Embroidery & Threads is a small, faith-based custom embroidery shop serving Castle Rock, Colorado and surrounding communities. Each piece is made to order for local pickup; shipping is not currently available.

## Services

- Custom embroidered apparel
- Baby and kids embroidery
- Seasonal and holiday embroidery
- Personalized gifts and keepsake pieces
- Matching and gift sets
- Collaborative custom orders, including colors, fonts, sizing, and personalization
- Local pickup in the Castle Rock, Colorado area

## Ordering

Customers can request an order through the contact form or by sending a direct message on Instagram. Embroidery & Threads works with each customer to confirm the design before stitching begins.

## Contact

- Email: embroideryandthreads@gmail.com
- Text (preferred): +1-720-465-1414
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/embroideryandthreads/
- Service area: Castle Rock, Colorado and surrounding areas

## Pages

- [Home and services](https://embroideryandthreads.com/)
- [Customer stories and reviews](https://embroideryandthreads.com/reviews)
- [Frequently asked questions](https://embroideryandthreads.com/faq)
- [Privacy policy](https://embroideryandthreads.com/privacy)

## Important details

- Custom orders are handled personally.
- Orders are currently available for local pickup only.
- Standard turnaround is about one week; rush service may be available for an additional fee.
- Inquiries are answered within 24 to 48 hours, and text is preferred.
- Payment is due when the order is placed. Venmo, Zelle, and cash are accepted.
- Pickup details are provided after payment.
- Personalized orders cannot be canceled or returned, and all sales are final.
- Wash embroidered items inside out in cold water with mild detergent and like colors. Hang dry or tumble dry on low, and do not iron directly over embroidery.
